name: Art Nouveau Local Social Package Review

nodes.name: Run social-package CLI
nodes.notes: Run n8n from the repository root, or edit this command to cd into the repo first. This node reads a JSON handoff from stdout only.

nodes.name: Parse CLI JSON
nodes.notes: Converts Execute Command stdout into the social-package object.

nodes.name: Validate social-package contract
nodes.notes: Validates only the n8n-facing boundary. Full article validation stays in the project tools.

nodes.name: Candidate gate
nodes.notes: Only candidate payloads move to the future-publication review object. Other valid statuses stop in local review.

parameters.jsCode:
const payload = $json;
const review = {
  prototype: 'local_n8n_social_review',
  contract: `${payload.contract.name}@${payload.contract.version}`,
  status: payload.queue_status,
  slug: payload.slug,
  requested_locale: payload.requested_locale,
  source_locale: payload.source_locale,
  title: payload.caption.title || '',
  caption: payload.caption.caption || '',
  cta: payload.caption.cta || '',
  hashtags: payload.caption.hashtags || [],
  hero: payload.media.hero || {},
  public_paths: payload.links.public_paths || {},
  preview_paths: payload.links.preview_paths || {},
  reasons: payload.reasons || []
};
return [{ json: review }];

nodes.name: Build local review object
nodes.notes: This is the local human review packet. It is not a publish command.

nodes.name: Build local stop review
nodes.notes: Valid but non-candidate payloads stop here for human review.
